mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_link_access_stats (id, full_short_url, gid, `date`, pv, uv, uip, `hour`, weekday, create_time, update_time, del_flag ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{fullShortUrl}, #{gid}, #{date}, #{pv}, #{uv}, #{uip}, #{hour}, #{weekday}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE pv = pv + #{pv}, uv = uv + #{uv}, uip = uip + #{uip}, update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT tlas.date, SUM(tlas.pv) AS pv, SUM(tlas.uv) AS uv, SUM(tlas.uip) AS uip FROM t_link tl INNER JOIN t_link_access_stats tlas ON tl.full_short_url = tlas.full_short_url WHERE tlas.full_short_url = #{fullShortUrl} AND tl.gid = #{gid} AND tl.del_flag = '0' AND tlas.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY tlas.full_short_url, tl.gid, tlas.date;
